name: DOLLAR TREE, INC.
business: The company operates discount retail stores under the Dollar Tree brand in the United States and Canada. It sells consumable merchandise (household paper, food, health products) and discretionary merchandise (toys, gifts, seasonal items) at low price points. The majority of items are priced at $2.00 or less, and the company serves a broad range of customers in suburban locations.

exposures.sentence: Through a partnership with Instacart, our customers can shop online and receive same-day delivery from more than 8,400 Dollar Tree stores, as of January 31, 2026, without having to visit a store.

Investments are underway for enhancements in automation in existing buildings to improve efficiency, as well as improvements in inventory management capabilities and upgrades to our warehouse management systems.

catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced the purchase of a 1.25 million square foot distribution center outside Phoenix, Arizona, expected to open in spring 2026 and service stores in Arizona, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, and Utah.

In April 2025, we announced plans to return to Marietta, Oklahoma, with a new, enhanced distribution center expected to be fully operational by spring 2027, with capacity to serve approximately 700 stores across the West and Southwest regions.
